title: Path Traversal
description: DocsViewer strips '../' once before joining the path. Nested traversal sequences collapse back to '../' after one pass. Escape the docs root and read /flag.txt.

hints.text: The filter does a single replace('../', ''). Single-pass. No loop until stable.
....// after one replace pass becomes ../ — stack three of them to escape the docs root three levels up to /.
